title: Attack Indicator
description: The attack indicator in white color shows when the enemy comes out of the state of invulnerability and you can also deal critical damage with a sword!
body: This texture pack will help you to deal damage with a sword (which shows with a white outline when you can hit again (at this time the creature's invulnerability decreases). Recommend Crosshair Tweaks for indicator opacity [Crosshair Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/crosshairtweaks)
